question: Write a C++ program that prompts the user to enter their name (as a single word) and their age. Then, print a greeting message displaying both pieces of information.

test_cases.expected: Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.
Hello, Charlie! You are 25 years old.

errors: The program reads the user's age but then prints a hardcoded value (25) instead of the actual age entered by the user.
